name: Kielbasa and Potato Crock Pot
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the kielbasa in the crock pot.
2. Add the frozen cubed hash browns to the crock pot.
3. Chop the green onions and add them to the crock pot.
4. Pour the cheese soup into the crock pot.
5. Stir in half a can of milk.
6. Cook on high for a while (approximately 1-2 hours).
7. Reduce heat to low and continue cooking for several more hours until everything is heated through and fully cooked.
